LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT NANTUCKET PAVERS, INC.'S, PARTIAL JOINDER IN MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND FOR ENTRY OF CONSENT JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF ECOLOGICAL RIGHTS FOUNDATION'S [CORRECTED] MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND FOR ENTRY OF CONSENT ORDER AS TO NANTUCKET PAVERS, INC. IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND THE SETTLEMENT COMPLIES WITH THE REQUIREMENTS FOR PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENTS UNDER HEALTH & SAFETY CODE SECTION 25249.7. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE WARNING THAT IS REQUIRED BY THE SETTLEMENT COMPLIES WITH HEALTH & SAFETY CODE SECTIONS 25249.5-25249.14; THE AWARD OF ATTORNEY'S FEES IS REASONABLE UNDER CALIFORNIA LAW; AND THE PENALTY AMOUNT IS REASONABLE BASED ON THE CRITERIA SET FORTH IN HEALTH & SAFETY CODE SECTION 25249.7(B)(2). ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (302/EPS)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-07-2019 Continued To Jun-18-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Partial Joinder In Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment; And Declaration Of Norman A. Ryan
Off Calendar May-09-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT NANTUCKET PAVERS, INC.'s, Partial Joinder In Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment.

Plaintiff Ecological Rights Foundation's [corrected] motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement and for entry of consent order as to Nantucket Pavers, Inc. is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements under Health & Safety Code section 25249.7. The Court finds that the warning that is required by the settlement complies with Health & Safety Code sections 25249.5-25249.14; the award of attorney's fees is reasonable under California law; and the penalty amount is reasonable based on the criteria set forth in Health & Safety Code section 25249.7(b)(2).

Order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/EPS)
